steps.title: Follow the timeline
steps.content: The passage moves forward through Shakespeare's career: he likely arrived in London around 1585, was known for plays by 1591, and the blank introduces an event in 1596. The needed transition signals a later point in time.

steps.title: Reject non-temporal transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals restatement, but the sentence adds a new event. Choice B signals contrast, and choice C signals consequence; neither relationship fits the timeline. The remaining transition marks forward movement from 1591 to 1596. The answer is D.
